name: Feature DoR — Capital Markets Extensions (Starter Draft)
description: Placeholder feature-level criteria for Capital Markets. CapMkts stewards should review and replace.
placeholder_note: Starter content. Replace with real CapMkts feature DoR criteria.

criteria.name: Regulatory Scope Identified
criteria.description: Which regulatory regimes the feature touches (FINRA, SEC, MSRB, FFIEC) and the relevant rule citations are listed.
criteria.why: Trading features that ship without regulatory mapping risk surprise enforcement actions.
criteria.fix: List applicable regulations (citation level) and the compliance review owner.
criteria.good_example: Regulations: FINRA Rule 2010 (general standards), SEC Rule 15c2-12 (continuing disclosure). Compliance owner: [Risk & Compliance lead].

criteria.name: Best Execution Logic Demonstrated
criteria.description: If the feature affects order routing or execution, the best-execution logic is documented and reviewable.
criteria.why: Best-execution is a regulatory expectation — features that affect routing must show their math.
criteria.fix: Document the best-execution algorithm or attest that the feature does not affect execution.
criteria.good_example: Best-ex: routes to dealer with tightest bid/ask within 100ms; fallback to next dealer on no-quote. Or: 'Feature does not affect execution.'
